description.en: A 64-bit value containing the sum of the QP values for every frame encoded by thisRTCRtpSender. This locally-computed value provides an indication of how heavily compressed the data is.Undefined for audio streams.

description.en: A map of the reasons that a media stream's resolution or framerate has been reduced, and the time that the quality was reduced for each reason.Undefined for audio streams.

description.en: A string indicating the reason why the stream is being quality-limited. One of:none,cpu,bandwidth, orother.Undefined for audio streams.
